title: Subtasks being able to be individually moved to completed with an automation
excerpt: Move only the subtask to the “Completed” group when its status changes to “Completed”. Can this feature please be added in the future - as completing subtasks is important for achieving the main task, and would be helpfu…

posts.author: laurajay90 (Laura)
posts.cookedHtml: Move only the subtask to the “Completed” group when its status changes to “Completed”. Can this feature please be added in the future - as completing subtasks is important for achieving the main task, and would be helpful to be able to display when the subtasks have been completed without having to archive or delete them.

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @laurajay90

When you refer to move it - Do you mean move it to a different item (remain as a subitem) or move it to a new group as an item (convert it from subitem to item and move it?)
